mnemonics.title: S.U.E
mnemonics.content: Structures Unite Elements, Unions Share Underlying Elements, Enumerate Unique Entries

mnemonics.title: Dot vs Arrow
mnemonics.content: Dot (.) for direct access, Arrow (->) when pointing - like 'this->member'

acronyms.expansion: Proper Alignment Determines Data Insertion Necessities Generally

visualTips.visualization: Imagine transparent overlapped boxes sharing same space
Picture numbered parking spots with named labels

analogies.analogy: Like a form with multiple fields (name, age, etc.)
Like a shared locker where only one item can be stored at a time
